channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bernie Sanders and AOC to campaign with El-Sayed as Democratic tensions shift to Michigan
item.description: Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will rally for Abdul El-Sayed amid nearly $15 million in AIPAC spending against his rival Haley Stevens.

item.title: Conservatives rally behind SAVE America Act after Trump declassifies 'shocking' election intelligence
item.description: Trump declassified intelligence on election vulnerabilities and called on all Americans to support the SAVE Act's passage.

item.title: Blanche meets with Epstein accusers after GOP senator's demand
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche met Thursday with accusers of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, following a Republican senator's request.

item.title: Forecaster moves California House seat toward Democrats
item.description: Sabato's Crystal Ball shifted California's 22nd Congressional District from Toss-up to Leans Democratic after certified primary results.
